dayScript: Episode: 'the wallets split on Messi.' 11:15 hero opens the loop (one superstar goes home; the money split 3-2). ~2:15 grade post pays it off and hands the baton to Colombia (same wallets, Friday-max callback). 3:30 Colombia decision window. loopReasoning: Ratchet: baseline ~2183 views. Best measured structure = locked-pick countdown (4,121v, 1.8x OVER). This run adds ONE variable: the corpus's 2.1x open-loop line 1 on top of the proven countdown format. Timing: our 12:00-14:00 posts average ~2.9K vs ~1.2K at 8-9 AM; 11:15-11:30 rides the pre-match velocity. Purpose: REACH; depth and link live in the self-reply.

hero.text:
One superstar goes home at noon. The wallets we track already picked which one...

The board says Argentina ML — 4 units.

But for the first time in weeks, the winning money split:

3 proven wallets took Argentina.
2 took Egypt.

Locks 11:45 ET. Graded here after.
hero.lint: SHIP 100 (v2 — reformatted for isolation/vertical escalation after owner catch; linter now enforces dense-block check)
hero.rtLine: 3 took Argentina. 2 took Egypt. One superstar goes home.

gradePosts.win:
Argentina handles it. ✅

4 units at -285 — favorites are supposed to look like this. The two wallets that took Egypt were wrong for the first time in a while.

The rest of them already moved on: Colombia +125 at 4 PM. Same Colombia that cashed Friday's max play.
gradePosts.loss:
Egypt just sent Messi home — and 2 of the wallets we track had it before kickoff.

We sized Argentina at 4 units and it lost. That's what sizing is for.

Colombia +125 at 4 PM. Same wallets, better price. The day isn't over.

colombiaHero.text:
Colombia again...

Friday, they cashed the board's biggest play of the week.

Today, the same tracked wallets came back for more — at +125 this time.

2.5 units. Colombia ML. 4:00 PM ET.

Picks lock 15 minutes before kick. Soccer since June 1: 22-9, +25 units.

replyTargets.url: 'Safe Argentina ticket, or chaos waiting to happen?' post
replyTargets.reply: The proven wallets we track split 3-2 on it — first non-unanimous read on a big favorite in weeks. Not a safe ticket.
Same board here: Argentina at noon, then a +125 Colombia read at 4 that the tracked money keeps coming back to.
